g.text: Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Find the child who never sleeps.
Ask the conductor for the whole truth.
Ride on and simply be present.
Turn to the traveler who needs you.
Chase the last of the truth.
Try to get off before the tunnel.
Set the night down and stay.
